creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the report Graham,

The tool tip help in bugzilla states the Summary is a short sentence that succinctly describes what the bug is about.

Would it be possible for this and other ports to be more aligned with that?

Having a long summary and  nonexistent description is the opposite of what the PR should look like.

Also it might be nice for the assignee to provide in the description context about the bug, instead of throwing just some links.

Thanks!
